Policies.paymentPolicyBody:
We accept payment via Mada, Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay and STC Pay through our secure payment gateway (Moyasar). All amounts are billed in Saudi Riyals (SAR) and include 15% VAT in compliance with ZATCA requirements.

Monthly plans are charged in advance and auto-renew unless cancelled at least 48 hours before the renewal date. A ZATCA-compliant tax invoice with a QR code is issued after every successful payment.

If a payment fails, we retry for up to 72 hours before suspending the subscription. Please ensure your payment method has sufficient funds and remains valid to avoid any disruption to scheduled classes.

The Academy reserves the right to revise pricing with at least 30 days notice before the next billing cycle. Active subscriptions are not affected by price changes until they renew.
Policies.refundPolicyBody:
Subscribers may request a full refund within 7 days of plan activation, provided no more than 2 live sessions have been attended and no more than 20% of the language lab content has been completed.

After the 7-day window, refunds are pro-rated based on remaining sessions in the current month, minus payment processing fees (max 2.5%).

The free placement test is non-refundable (it is free of charge by default). Private sessions cancelled by the student less than 24 hours before the scheduled start time are non-refundable.

Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5–10 business days. You will receive an email confirmation once the refund is processed.

To request a refund, please contact us via our [contact page](/contact) or WhatsApp, including the invoice number and reason for the request.
Policies.privacyPolicyBody:
We are committed to protecting your personal data in compliance with the Saudi Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL). We collect only the data necessary to deliver our educational services: name, email, phone number, date of birth, and secure payment information.

Your data is used solely to manage your account, send class notifications and academic reports, process payments, and improve the learning experience. We do not sell your data or share it with advertising networks.

Payment details are processed by our licensed payment provider (Moyasar). Card numbers are never stored on our servers. Passwords are stored using bcrypt encryption.

You have the right at any time to access, correct, delete your data, or withdraw your consent to processing. Notification preferences (email, SMS, WhatsApp) can be managed from your account settings.

We retain limited audit logs for security and regulatory compliance for 24 months. For more information or to make a request, contact us at privacy@hajr.academy.

TechCheck.title: Pre-class tech check
TechCheck.subtitle: Four quick steps — must pass before entering the classroom.
TechCheck.introBlurb: Let's make sure your device and network are ready before class.
TechCheck.speedBlurb: We'll download 5 MB and upload 1 MB to measure your link.
TechCheck.cameraBlurb: Allow the camera and confirm you can see yourself.
TechCheck.latencyBlurb: Ten quick pings to measure average round-trip.
TechCheck.fix_downloadMbps: Download speed is low — move closer to your router or use a cable.
TechCheck.fix_uploadMbps: Upload speed is low — close apps that consume bandwidth.
TechCheck.fix_latencyMs: Latency is high — try another network or restart your router.
TechCheck.fix_audioPeakDb: Microphone level is low — move closer or raise input sensitivity.
TechCheck.fix_camera: Couldn't access the camera — check browser settings.
TechCheck.fix_mic: Couldn't access the microphone — check browser settings.
TechCheck.bannerTitle: Reminder: run the tech check before your next class
TechCheck.bannerBody: You have a class coming up. Run the check now — it takes a minute.

Analytics.overviewBlurb: We store IP and User-Agent as SHA-256 hashes (first 16 chars) only — never the raw values. Rows older than 90 days are auto-purged.
